case_title: ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. PACIFIC BELL TELEPHONE COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT PACIFIC BELL TELEPHONE COMPANY ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 DAYS
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR JUN-11-2012. MAY-18-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
